typography.instructions: Use IBM Plex Sans for all standard text to maintain a technical, authoritative look. Apply 'font-mono' and 'tabular-nums' to all numeric data in tables (readings, coordinates, limits) to ensure vertical alignment of digits.

colors.instructions: Maintain a highly muted, professional dark theme (Bloomberg Terminal / Grafana enterprise style). Absolutely NO gradients, NO purple/violet, NO glowing neon outside of strict status indicators.

layouts.global_nav: Top horizontal navigation bar, solid background #09090B, border-b border-border. Sticky top.
layouts.page_container: Full-bleed with px-4 or px-6 to maximize screen real estate for dense data.
layouts.dashboard: Dense rows and bento grid for top-level stats (Total Campaigns, Active Monitors).
layouts.tables: Dense layout (py-2 px-3 cells). Sticky headers. First column sticky. Left align text, right align numeric values.
layouts.tabs: Campaign detail page must use top-aligned tabs to switch between Overview, Readings, Settings, and Reports.

grids.instructions: Use tight gaps (gap-4). Every pixel must be utilized. Cards and containers must have sharp or minimal radius (rounded-sm) for a rigorous technical feel.

visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Technical Look' grid borders (1px solid #27272A). Reveal grid lines between sections. Avoid shadows.
visual_enhancers.shadows: None. Rely on 1px borders for element separation. Flat and utilitarian.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Subtle background lightening (hover:bg-zinc-800) rather than lifting or drop-shadows.

motion.instructions: Minimal to none. 100ms fade on hover. Zero bouncy animations. Fast, snappy, authoritative.

image_urls.description: Avatar for the logged-in engineer / inspector.

media.instructions: Do not use marketing imagery. Only use functional icons and user avatars.

3d_libraries.instructions: None required. This is a 2D dense data tool.

accessibility.instructions: Ensure WCAG AA contrast for all text. Status colors must have accompanying icons (e.g., check/cross) so they are color-blind friendly. Use tabular-nums for numbers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build Phase 1 skeleton screens: Dashboard, Create/Edit Campaign, Campaign Detail (Tabs: Overview, Readings, Settings, Reports), Upload Data, NCEC Limits.
Implement a strict dark theme using the provided color palette (Zinc/Slate base, flat technical look).
For the 'Readings' table: Include a manual-flag toggle per row, use monospaced numerals (font-mono), apply subtle green/red row background tints for valid/invalid flags.
For the 'NCEC Limits' page: Build a dense, read-only data table for pollutants.
For 'Upload Data': Build a drag-and-drop zone with dashed borders and a column preview skeleton.
Avoid Shadcn 'Card' components if they add too much padding; use custom raw HTML divs with tight padding (p-4) and 1px borders.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, table rows).
DO NOT use emojis. DO NOT use generic AI marketing aesthetics.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for technical, sharp icons.
Ensure the UI looks like a serious desktop software tool for environmental engineers.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy, or in this case, 1px technical borders.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Use modern button styles but keep them sharp (rounded-sm) for this technical app.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
